description: PRISM Phase 3b — UI E2E test scaffolds for Landing Page Advisor
notes: @playwright/test is NOT installed. Run: npm install --save-dev @playwright/test
All tests require a running dev server: npm run dev
playwright.config.ts was CREATED at project root
tests marked test.fail() are intentional — they confirm known findings from static analysis

flows.name: auth-flow
flows.description: Landing page → sign-in button → modal → email step → OTP step → close/back

flows.name: landing-analyze-flow
flows.description: Landing URL input → validation → mode tabs → submit → loading → /analyze results

flows.name: accessibility-checks
flows.description: A11y checks across pages — skip link, aria-expanded, focus trap, aria-describedby

flows.name: history-page
flows.description: History page — auth guard, loading, empty state, item cards, pagination

flows.name: posthog-settings
flows.description: PostHog settings — auth guard, save, test connection, masked key, disconnect
